content: Eleventy is a simpler static-site generator focused on the 11ty pipeline.
The Eleventy data cascade resolves variables from front-matter, data files, and global directories.
Eleventy supports Nunjucks, Liquid, Markdown, and JavaScript as template languages.
An Eleventy plugin extends the .eleventy.js config with filters, shortcodes, or collections.
Static-site generators precompute HTML at build time and serve it from a CDN with no runtime.
Operation Husky was the Allied naval landing on Sicily during 1943.
After the Sicily landings, General Patton's Seventh Army raced westward to Palermo.
The Italian campaign followed the Sicilian operation and toppled the Mussolini regime.
Allied Mediterranean strategy in 1943 aimed to knock Italy out of the Axis.
Sicilian mountainous terrain shaped the tempo of the 1943 ground campaign.
Astrocytes coordinate slow tripartite synapses; they are not the gradient.
Hebbian learning strengthens connections between co-active neurons over time.
Glia outnumber neurons in many brain regions but serve support and modulation roles.
GaOTTT borrows the astrocyte analogy: slow, shared, structural modulation rather than gradient steps.
Synaptic plasticity is the biological substrate that TTT optimizers mirror in software.
FAISS IndexFlatIP performs inner-product search over float32 vectors.
BM25 ranks documents by token frequency normalized to document length.
Embedding cosine similarity measures semantic closeness in a high-dimensional vector space.
Reciprocal Rank Fusion combines disparate rankers scale-invariantly.
Gravity waves propagate recursively through the knowledge graph in GaOTTT.
Carbonara pasta uses guanciale, pecorino, eggs — no cream involved.
Starchy pasta water emulsifies fats into a glossy Italian sauce.
Roman cuisine highlights cured pork, hard cheese, and minimal ingredient lists.
Tempering egg yolks with warm fat avoids scrambling them in a pan sauce.
Guanciale is cured pig jowl; pancetta is its belly cousin with a milder flavor.
11ty 静的サイトジェネレーターは sitemap.xml を自動生成し SEO に強い。
1943 年 シチリア 上陸 作戦 Operation Husky で連合軍が地中海戦線を開いた。
アストロサイト は 三者間 シナプス の sluggish 協調 を 担当 する 神経 細胞 である。
Random distractor about quantum entanglement and Bell inequalities.
Distractor: medieval Cordoba was a thriving center of Andalusian culture.
